summary: Completed comprehensive testing of TCD Tickets landing page redesign with 'Electric Academia' theme. All major features and UI elements working correctly.

integration_issues.issue: Some navigation links occasionally don't respond to clicks (Next.js client-side routing timing issue)
integration_issues.workaround: All pages load correctly when accessed directly via URL

passed_tests: Landing page loads without errors at provided URL
Navbar visible with TCD Tickets logo and all navigation links
Hero section with 'Discover Trinity Events' heading and Trinity College Dublin badge
Trinity College Dublin image displays correctly
Stats row shows '0+ Events', '50+ Societies', '5K+ Students'
Upcoming Events section with 'No events yet' message (expected)
Browse by Category section with all 6 category cards
Category cards clickable with proper navigation to search filters
CTA section with 'Ready to discover your next experience?' and buttons
Floating navbar glassmorphism effect works on scroll
Mobile responsiveness with working hamburger menu
All individual pages (search, calendar, campus-world, signup) accessible
